name: io.github.xllinbupt/liepin-jobs
title: Liepin Jobs
description: Liepin job search and resume workflows backed by the official Liepin MCP server.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer gateway token from the Liepin MCP configuration page. Format: Bearer mcp_gateway_token_xxx

headers.name: x-user-token
headers.description: Liepin user token from the Liepin MCP configuration page.
